author: gb9t
content: Iteration 10: usb/host/xhci.md committed (a5d28fc, 239 lines). USB 3.x host controller — every modern motherboard. ~26300 upstream lines covered including DbC, sideband, vendor quirks (~30 PCI vendor:device pairs), SoC variants. Rust translation: typed TRB rings with cycle-bit as type invariant closes the largest historical bug class structurally; typed EP/slot state machines. Grsec: IOMMU mandatory (refuse probe without per-device isolation — closes Thunderclap/BadUSB-DMA class), TRB event payload validation (closes 'compromised xHCI forges event' class), Stop-EP/Cancel-URB race fixed via typed VirtEp (closes CVE-2024-26663), DbC requires CAP_SYS_RAWIO + LOCKDOWN_DEBUGFS, LOCKDOWN_KERNEL_RAM disables DbC entirely. Session totals: 10 vendor-driver Tier-3 docs added covering ~150K upstream LOC (mlx5×4 + cloud trio + bnxt + mpt3sas + xhci). Next iteration: drivers/gpu/drm/amd/amdgpu/ — AMD GPU driver (Radeon Pro + Instinct + every Ryzen iGPU).
